title: ToolActionRequest
description: Payload for invoking a whitelisted editor tool action. Sent as the payload of a BridgeRequestEnvelope targeting EditorService/RunToolAction. Mirrors the ToolActionRequest struct and ToolActionId enum in Shared/AtlasBridgeContract/include/AtlasBridgeTypes.h.

actionId.description: Numeric identifier of the whitelisted tool action to invoke (ToolActionId enum). 0=ValidateData, 1=RunPCGPreview, 2=OpenScene, 3=FocusEntity, 4=RegenerateSchemas.

parameter.description: Optional action-specific parameter string. Interpretation depends on actionId (e.g. scene path for OpenScene, entity id for FocusEntity).

dryRun.description: When true the action is simulated but no persistent changes are committed. Defaults to true for safety.
